title: Florian Fackler | AI Automation for Swiss SMEs
description: Privacy-focused AI automation for Swiss SMEs. Document processing, workflow automation, and intelligent assistants. Your data stays in Switzerland. By Florian Fackler IT Services, Starrkirch-Wil.
hero_tagline: Smart AI solutions for Swiss companies — with your data protection built in, not bolted on. 25+ years of experience turning technology into a real advantage for your business.
usp_1_text:
Your competitors copy sensitive data into ChatGPT every day. I build AI that runs on your own systems — nothing is sent to the internet, nothing leaves your company. 

No data leaks. Fully compliant. Real results.
usp_2_list: An AI assistant that knows your business and answers questions based on your own documents.
Automated tasks that save real hours every week — not just impressive demos.
Smart email handling that sorts, drafts replies, and routes messages for you.
usp_3_list: 71% of Swiss SMEs use or test AI right now.
85% use ChatGPT — but only a third have rules for handling data safely.
62% can't find the right people to help them keep up.

industry_cards.title: Trade & Online Shops
industry_cards.text: 15,000 Swiss online shops. CHF 14.9 billion in revenue. I help you manage product catalogs, connect your systems, and let AI write your product texts — while keeping customer data in Switzerland.

industry_cards.title: Professional Services
industry_cards.text: Fiduciaries, insurers, and consultancies handle sensitive client data every day. AI assistants that analyze documents and draft reports — without sending anything to the cloud.

industry_cards.title: Industry & Manufacturing
industry_cards.text: Rising costs demand smarter processes. I automate routine work, connect your systems, and eliminate manual steps that drain your team's time.

industry_cards.title: Healthcare & Education
industry_cards.text: When protecting sensitive data is non-negotiable, on-premise AI is the responsible choice. Fully compliant, no data shared with third parties, real productivity gains.

service_cards.title: AI Solutions
service_cards.text: From first conversation to a working solution. I find where AI saves you real money, set everything up, and train your team to use it.
details: AI assistant that answers questions based on your documents
Smart chatbots for your website or internal team

service_cards.title: Systems & Strategy
service_cards.text: Systems that grow with your business. I plan and build the foundation that works today and supports you for years to come.
details: Simple solutions where possible, complex ones where needed

service_cards.title: Online Shops
service_cards.text: New shop, migration, or optimization — with smart product catalogs and automated processes that cut manual work dramatically.
details: Switching to a new shop platform

service_cards.title: Interim IT Leadership
service_cards.text: Need someone to lead your IT but not ready for a full-time hire? I step in temporarily to organize your team, set priorities, and get things running smoothly.

details: Fine-tuning the AI to your needs

pricing_cards.title: Monthly Support
details: Priority support with a dedicated contact person

details: AI that searches and answers from your documents
A custom chatbot for your team or customers
Custom automation for a specific process

contact_subtitle: Zurich, Bern, Basel, Lucerne — all within an hour by train. Let's meet for a coffee and talk about what AI can actually do for your business.
references_intro: Real automation work, not slide decks.

references.project: N8N PIM Automation + AI Product Texts
references.result: Automatic product data scraping → PIM import. Follow-up: Brand-voice AI product descriptions – zero manual work.
Weekly blog post, brand-voice compliant, fully automated via CI/CD pipeline.
Customers find guitars with similar tone characteristics and price – measurable conversion lift.
Daily post: YouTube transcript → own research → Hugo post via CI/CD commit.

pricing_note: Project pricing by agreement. Hardware can be purchased or rented.
